raw_calls.callee:
()
	task.spawn(function(): ()
		local syncEvent: Instance? = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("S2C_AntiCheatStateSync", 10)
		if not syncEvent then
			local remotes: Instance? = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
			if remotes then
				syncEvent = remotes:WaitForChild("S2C_AntiCheatStateSync", 10)
			end
		end

		if syncEvent and syncEvent:IsA("RemoteEvent") then
			syncEvent.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(...: any): ()
				-- Clean, empty callback to consume events and prevent queue exhaustion/warnings
			end)
			print("[AntiExploitController] Hooked and guarded S2C_AntiCheatStateSync queue successfully.")
		else
			warn("[AntiExploitController] S2C_AntiCheatStateSync remote event could not be resolved.")
		end
	end)
end

function AntiExploitController.Start()
